description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library — fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
What's Changed
🎉 New Features
- Custom user themes — CustomThemeDefinition with dark/light modes, 5-input color picker, live preview pane, theme editor dialog
- Color Picker control — reusable ColorPickerFlyout with HSV spectrum, hue slider, hex input, applied across accent + custom theme flows
- Artist Detail page (Apple Music style) — hero banner with artist image/name, Play/Shuffle pills, Top Songs 3-column grid, Featured/Essential Albums, Albums grid, Singles & EPs, About card with bio/metadata
- MusicBrainz biography service — fetches and caches per-artist data at %APPDATA%\Noctis\artist_bios, 1 req/sec TOS-gated
- Performer field in metadata — custom PERFORMER tag for round-trip without colliding main Artist field
- iTunes Search Artwork — red pill button opens flyout with up to 8 candidates from Apple's public API, Standard/Highest resolution options
- iTunes Search Animated Artwork — queries iTunes, scrapes Apple Music page for videoUrl, downloads MP4, stages for save with clean handling when unavailable
- Top Artists row on Home — 6-column circular avatars ranked by play count, Deezer image enrichment, click-through to Artist Detail
- Unified Add to Playlist dialog — pick existing playlist or inline-create with name + description, replaces legacy submenu flow across 11 surfaces
- Library/Cover Flow toggle in playlists — appears on playlist detail pages via sidebar, tile click, or back-button restore
- Playback bar moved to bottom — floating overlay (Apple Music style) with translucent glass look and repositioned menu
- Queue Popup redesign — "Currently Playing" header, now-playing track card, track count, Clear pill, sticky behavior (doesn't close on nav/outside clicks)
- Queue drag-to-reorder (Apple Music UX) — pointer-tracked dragging with 6px threshold, floating pill preview, drop indicator line, MoveInQueue sync
- Playlist drag-to-reorder — floating pill preview (cover + title + artist + duration), pointer-tracked with existing drop indicator, exclude smart playlists
- Lyrics page full playback bar redesign — standard PlaybackBarView instead of custom bar, new Observable flags on PlayerViewModel, lyrics-mode entries in ⋯ menu
- Standalone lyrics timeline slider — current/remaining time labels, draggable seek, sits below track metadata
- Compact lyrics-page controls-only strip — hides mini cover art, artist/title, old timeline while maintaining normal layout elsewhere
🔧 Bug Fixes
- Album-art flicker on track switch — previous artwork stays visible until new bitmap decodes; explicit clear only when no artwork
- Ctrl+A select-all outside Albums tab — added Focusable/Focus/OnViewKeyDown wiring to Home, Songs, Playlist, Favorites
- Artist detail page not rendering — added ArtistDetailViewModel → ArtistDetailView mapping in App.axaml
- Semantic reds tinted by accent color — restored to literal #E74856 across 8 views + TrackContextMenuBuilder
- Settings toggles not updating live on accent change — App.AccentApplied event with LottieToggle resubscribe on OnLoaded/OnUnloaded
- Lyrics page accent text not updating live — LyricsViewModel subscribes to AccentApplied, replays UpdateForegroundsForBackground
- Combined-name artist images falling back to silhouette — IsDeezerPlaceholderUrl detection, primary-artist fallback in ArtistImageService
- Click zoom animation on artist rows — Button.artist-item:pressed { scale(1) } override
- Empty Home section headers — Most Listened To/Recently Played hidden when no content
- iTunes advisory dropdown clipping — reduced width so arrow sits closer to text
- Artwork search returning random results — prioritizes album artwork, falls back to track title for standalone singles
- Animated artwork search HLS-only failure — parses Apple Music variants instead of stopping at HLS playlist
- Animated artwork removal not clearing preview — preview now clears immediately on remove
- Metadata tab hover color going gray — kept accent color on Artwork/Animated Artwork tab text
- Metadata popup dropdown styling inconsistent — matched Options equalizer to iTunes advisory pill style
- Metadata tab-strip clipped text and scrim artifact — removed mismatched-color scrim, adjusted right-chevron spacing
- Invalid Panel.ZIndex startup crash — fixed XAML break in panel definitions
- Artist clicks opening profile instead of discography — changed to full discography album grid
- Artist grouping including collaborations — changed to primary artists only (Bad Bunny & Bomba Estéreo → Bad Bunny)
- Top Artists rendering missing images — added persistent fallback icon, avoided tearing down identical rows
- Playlist toggle disappeared on tile click — OnPlaylistOpened now re-runs SetupGlobalViewModeToggle
- Cover Flow exit dumping to Playlists list — added _preCoverFlowView to stash/restore playlist VM
- Light theme toggle text dark-on-dark on lyrics page — forced Foreground="#FFFFFF"
- EQ "Custom" empty on restart — reordered load so SyncCustomInVisiblePresets runs before ComboBox binding
- Theme switching changing accent color — SetTheme now re-applies active accent via SetAccent after theme dictionary merge
- Animated artwork popup not closing after variant pick — bridged Flyout.IsOpen binding in code-behind with explicit Hide() call
- Artwork "Remove + Save" reappearing on album return — delete persisted PNG cache, fan out WriteAlbumArt(null) to all tracks, stop re-extracting embedded copies
- Track duration showing 0:00 — extended ffprobe fallback to fill stream + format duration for broken/VBR files
- Lyrics page player bar clipping at edges — widened left content container, reserved width for expanded volume slider
- Automated menu placement — TopEdgeAlignedLeft with FlipY for consistency, RightEdgeAlignedBottom with FlipX for player-bar Options (Apple Music style)
- Nested submenu corners not matching parent — applied OverlayCornerRadius="16" globally via resource override
🎨 UI Polish
- Settings > Advanced section — visual grouped stack instead of separate cards with red warning note on Clear Artwork Cache
- Settings descriptions — shortened and clarified across 12+ toggles (Discord Rich Presence, Last.fm, Lyrics providers, Library Scan, Album page tint, Animated Artwork, Transition Mode, Sound Check)
- Animated Artwork description — corrected to "Show animated cover art when available"
- Cover Flow hover zoom — removed from artist/album title buttons
- Artist hover overlay — trimmed bottom edge for balanced spacing
- Favorited albums heart overlay — 22px heart on bottom-right, also added to Cover Flow center cover
- Album artwork decode quality — bumped 384 → 768px with HighQuality in Albums, Home recently-played to 768px
- Favorites heart size — increased 16 → 22px; bumped matching hearts in Albums/Home to 18px
- Settings reorganization — 12 section headers → 8 (merged AUDIO/PLAYBACK, removed EQUALIZER, consolidated MEDIA FOLDERS + Library, merged STORAGE into OVERVIEW)
- Advanced cards unified — thin dividers match Text Animation card layout
- Album detail action buttons — Play/Shuffle as red pills with icon + text, reordered Play first, smaller sizing (26/22×8, icon 16, font 14)
- Metadata window header cover art — enlarged 72×72 → 104×104
- Metadata window favorited heart — red HeartFillIcon on right when track is favorited
- Metadata footer buttons — Cancel left, Save right, all bold, Top hairline separator restored
- Artwork/Animated Artwork preview — identical fixed-size 360×360 squares to prevent clipping
- Accent color theming — 10 curated presets (Crimson, Sunset, Tangerine, Gold, Lime, Emerald, Cyan, Azure, Indigo, Magenta) + Canva-style custom picker
- Runtime accent overlay — ResourceDictionary merge with SystemAccentColor + derived shades + all fanned brushes, preserving semantic reds
- 150 hardcoded accent values swept to {DynamicResource} or runtime resolution across 33 XAML + .cs files
- Artist image lookup improved — Deezer up to 10 results with exact-match ranking, prefer picture_xl/big/medium
- Top Artists aggregation — capped at 6, uses primary artists, persistent fallback icon, no tearing on refresh
- App-wide menu hover theming — MenuFlyout/MenuItem/MenuBar AccentApplied overlay with 22%/35% alpha
- Settings modal overlay (Apple Music style) — 780×720 rounded card, dark backdrop, restored sidebar selection after close
- Settings Profile section — 64px round avatar (→ %APPDATA%\Noctis\profile\avatar.<ext>) + display-name TextBox, live save
- Profile avatar button — profile-avatar-btn class keeps round on hover
- Profile name field — profile-input class strips background/border on idle/hover/focus
- Metadata tab-strip improved — chevron overflow UI (< / > auto-show on overflow), mouse wheel scrolling, clean appearance
- Nested submenu popups — 16px rounded corners matching parent context menu
- Queue popup background — #E61C1C1C (~90%) transparent instead of opaque
- Queue clear button — red rounded pill instead of icon button
- Queue row spacing — subtle separator lines (6% opacity), vertical spacing between rows
- Songs/Library/Favorites page buttons — accent-colored pill (CornerRadius="999", tight padding, hand cursor)
- Sort menu — reordered (Title, Album, Artist, Genre, Year, Time, Plays), Year as new sort option, checkmarks on active
- Shuffle icon appearance — bumped to bold, balanced with heavier text
- Create Smart Playlist dialog — Create button on right (swapped with Cancel)
- Artist discography top bar — Play/Shuffle fused into one accent pill
- "Add to Playlist" context menu — removed submenu arrow, leaf MenuItem opens new dialog
- Delete Playlist — red text + icon in all contexts
- "Remove from Playlist" — red text + icon
- Create Playlist dialog — renamed from "Create new playlist…", killed hover zoom on create pill + playlist rows, rebuilt to bind PlaylistNavItem for live cover art/title updates
- Sidebar PLAYLISTS header — removed standalone + button
- Home plays badge — centered number, "plays" word higher via StackPanel split
